title: Thickly Be-Beveled Buttons
description: Makes menu buttons smoother and their bevels thicker.
body:
Also available for [Bedrock Edition](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/thickly-be-beveled-buttons-bedrock-edition/)!

**Features:**

 * Makes menu buttons smoother and their bevels thicker.
 * yeah that's it.

**What's the difference between FULL and LITE?**

Older versions of this pack came in two variants, FULL and LITE: The FULL variant had compatibility with game versions all the way back to 1.15, but had occasional issues with other resource packs. The LITE variant had no such issues, but only supported game versions back to 1.20.2, as the current version does.
